creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: I think the right way forward is to rip out SSLv2 support from fetchmail, which I have already done in the upstream Git branch "legacy_64" that I plan to release 6.4.0 from later, and what I had already done for Debian five years ago, but hadn't released that at the time. The references are in FreeBSD Bugzilla Bug #212055.  It's not a duplicate nor a "Depends on" in the strict sense, so I'm setting "See Also" instead.
